clue: It may pick up items outside of battle, too.
extract: Pickup ものひろい Game's Text: The Pokémon may pick up the item an opposing Pokémon used during a battle. It may pick up items outside of battle, too. In-Depth Effect: Has a 10% chance of finding and holding an item after battle. Will not work if this Pokémon is already holding an item. From Black & White, it allows for the user to pick up the item of its opponent or ally if they used up the item in battle.
